reason: The image depicts what appears to be a modern-day discovery of old coins on a rocky shore near the sea. However, the presence of plastic shovels and buckets, modern trainers/sneakers, and modern clothing disqualify it from representing the 1985 'Découverte du trésor de Lava' authentically. Plastic was becoming common in the 80s, but not for archeological tools, and tennis shoes would be of a different style than the ones shown. Also, digital photography was not yet popularized in 1985.
